prompt: Design a 120 x 80 x 40 mm simple enclosure with 3 mm walls.
Make a stepped shaft 120 mm long, 24 mm main diameter, 16 mm secondary diameter, with a 45 mm step.
Make a spur gear with 24 teeth, 80 mm outer diameter, 10 mm wide, and 12 mm bore.
Build a 1000 mm long by 200 mm outer diameter helical spring with 12 mm wire and 80 mm pitch.
